6/15/2017 Megalodon Marketing Mail - follow up email after call - attach playbook to this email

Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
follow up email after call attach playbook to this email
Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing> 	Thu, Jun 15, 2017 at 11:31 AM
To: Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
Hey Ryan,
Awesome speaking with you, looking forward to turning this project around for you guys quickly and with a high level of
professionalism and premium work provided.
I've attached some information to follow up on our conversation and some documentation attached to the email that covers
intimate details of the deal. Just to be clear, my agency will be providing you full service agency work for 30 days at the
social services price point to maximize the value you receive as new clients and to help drive as much revenue for your
company as possible in our first action cycle together.
Here's what that looks like for someone who works with my agency on our elite level packaging at
$12,000/mo:
1.) Paid advertising across all digital channels (ad spend included)
2.) Organic content distribution (blogs, youtube, social media content, gifs, videos, etc)
3.) Social Services (we take over all social accounts you have with the intention to attract, engage and monetize
an audience of ideal customers)
4.) Landing pages
5.) Websites (with real time changes)
7.) PR we get you published on Huffington Post, Forbes, Fortune, Inc, Business Insider, Entrepreneur, and other
large distribution channels.
8.) Influencer Marketing opportunities with the worlds top influencers on social media and television. (Services via
Branden Hampton the #1 social media influencer in the world ranked by Forbes)
9.) Fan base acquisition and retention
10) ROI Performance Management
11.) Email Marketing
12.) Marketing Automation
13.) Creative Services (we handle your graphic design and creative needs)
14.) Sales, Support, Admin, and Executive Training and Staffing Coordination/Structure
Here's what that looks like for someone who works with my agency on our premium social media
packaging at $4,000/mo:
1. Social Media Strategy Development
2. Social Media Consulting
3. Community Management
4. Crisis Management
5. Measurement & Monitoring
6. Social Listening
7. Article Creation & Distribution
8. Social Selling Consulting & Execution
9. YouTube Views/Subscribers Growth
AKA we become everything you would ever need out of an in house creative and executive unit for 40% less cost
on average.
Here is some media coverage:
